description: User control points across the Gaijinn manufacturing pipeline — maps process stages to intent-map actions, API endpoints, UI components, and risk gates. Authored from USER process-stage table (2026-06-18).

control_points.action_required: Provide natural language project goal and define initial scan parameters in .gaijinn/project.json
control_points.system_feedback: Confirmation of initialized state and manifest of detected files/domain scope
control_points.interface_requirement: Chat-style text input and JSON Editor / Config Validator

control_points.action_required: Select presets (Backend only, Full Stack) or individual phase toggles
control_points.system_feedback: Dynamic stage rail updates to show selected workflow steps
gaps: Browser phase selector removed pending UI rebuild

control_points.action_required: Select coding model for agents (e.g., deepseek-v4-flash, grok-composer-2.5-fast) and verify linter rule application
control_points.system_feedback: System confirms model uniformity and provides semantic integrity reports
control_points.interface_requirement: Global dropdown in advanced settings and dependency graph visualization
gaps: Model uniformity badge before atomic deploy
vault vs code domain linter preview

control_points.action_required: Review and approve generated build manifest (work units, paths, risks) via .gaijinn/blueprint.md
control_points.system_feedback: Visual representation of implementation blueprint and resource allocation preview
control_points.interface_requirement: Expandable card-based list of work units and Markdown Preview with Approval Toggle
gaps: Explicit approval gate before deploy (currently implicit)

control_points.action_required: Execute integrity preflight with optional flags (e.g., --fail-on-shadow-bridge)
control_points.system_feedback: Reporting of gravity/curvature metrics and Shadow Bridge counts
control_points.interface_requirement: Status indicators (Ready/Review) and node-level risk markers
gaps: command-engine Phase 02 topology wired to live graph.json

control_points.action_required: Trigger semantic validation and review orphan links
control_points.system_feedback: Linting report identifying warnings vs. errors
gaps: Full validation dashboard in terminal UI

control_points.action_required: Select number of isolated worker directories/agents to spawn
control_points.system_feedback: System provides swarm rationale and idle-agent warnings
control_points.interface_requirement: Step-based counter or recommended size selection buttons
gaps: Browser swarm picker removed pending UI rebuild

control_points.action_required: Commit to deployment fee and trigger grid spawn (irreversible)
control_points.system_feedback: Real-time SSE terminal streams from worker output logs
control_points.interface_requirement: Progress bar (no cancel button) and dynamic agent grid layout

control_points.action_required: Manage worker isolation and path scope permissions
control_points.system_feedback: Real-time logs, gate status (checkmarks), and error alerts
Composite structural score, validation pass rate, and trespass reports

control_points.action_required: Set structural_score thresholds or ADR-waivable states
gaps: ADR waiver flow with council receipt

control_points.action_required: Request ZIP export or view project-root changes
control_points.system_feedback: Merged code package delivery with summary of integrated work units
control_points.interface_requirement: Download button and diff-modal for change review
gaps: Browser deliverable panel removed pending UI rebuild

superior_ux_principles: Stage rail mirrors manufacturing plant order — never skip a station in the UI narrative
High-risk controls require explicit confirmation copy (atomic sprint, billing, merge)
System feedback always shows inferred state from real artifacts (governance.json, not vibes)
Vault projects surface knowledge linter + dual-law; code projects surface preflight + curvature
Confusion_count drives evaluator — every control point maps to a testable invariant
Blueprint approval is a human gate between Planning and Execution — not implicit

implementation_priority.reason: Highest demo value; blocks accidental deploy
Audit matrix with already_merged is the trust surface
SSE logs + no-cancel UX completes the sprint story
Topology screen is the moat visualization
